sentences.arabic: أَجْرَتِ الصَّيْدَلِيَّةُ الْمَحَلِّيَّةُ تَخْفِيضَاتٍ عَلَى الأَدْوِيَةِ.
sentences.translation: Lokalna apoteka je napravila popuste na lijekove.
sentences.translationEn: The local pharmacy offered discounts on medicines.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الزَّبَائِنِ لِلِاسْتِفَادَةِ مِنَ التَّخْفِيضَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi kupci su došli da iskoriste popuste.
sentences.translationEn: Many customers came to take advantage of the discounts.

sentences.translation: Farmaceut je savjetovao kupce o odgovarajućim lijekovima.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist advised customers about suitable medicines.
The offer continues until the end of the month.
